prompt: Apply the oil painting style from the reference image to the source photograph, transforming the photograph into a stylized painting with similar textures and tones.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the photorealistic portrait of a woman, by applying the oil painting style from image 2. Transform image 1 into a stylized painting, incorporating the visible, thick impasto brushstrokes and the vibrant, expressive tonality characteristic of image 2, while maintaining the original subject and composition of image 1.
